summary.en: Customer loyalty and payments platform that turns transactions into repeat business for small local merchants.
summary.zh: 顧客忠誠度與支付平台,把每筆交易轉化為在地小商家的回頭客生意。

highlight.en: A YC W11 alum that grew to 60M+ users across 14,000+ small businesses, driving over $3B in local sales a year. SumUp acquired Fivestars in October 2021 for $317M in cash and stock.
highlight.zh: YC W11 校友,成長至涵蓋逾 14,000 家小商家、超過 6,000 萬名用戶,每年帶動超過 30 億美元的在地銷售額。SumUp 於 2021 年 10 月以 3.17 億美元的現金加股票收購 Fivestars。

funding.en: Acquired by SumUp for $317M (2021); last valued ~$285M before the deal
funding.zh: 2021 年被 SumUp 以 3.17 億美元收購;收購前估值約 2.85 億美元

sources.title: European point of sale provider SumUp acquires Fivestars for $317M | TechCrunch
SumUp Completes Acquisition of Fivestars

summary.en: Cloud EHR, practice management, and medical billing platform for modern medical practices and their patients.
summary.zh: 為現代醫療診所及其病患打造的雲端電子病歷、診所管理與醫療帳務平台。

highlight.en: An early mobile-first EHR (YC W11) used by thousands of physicians and millions of patients, processing billions in medical billing. EverCommerce acquired DrChrono in November 2021 for roughly $180M, folding it into its EverHealth group.
highlight.zh: 早期主打行動裝置的電子病歷系統(YC W11),服務數千名醫師與數百萬名病患,處理數十億美元的醫療帳務。EverCommerce 於 2021 年 11 月以約 1.8 億美元收購 DrChrono,併入旗下 EverHealth 事業群。

funding.zh: 2021 年被 EverCommerce 以約 1.8 億美元收購

sources.title: EverCommerce Completes Acquisition of DrChrono
EverCommerce to acquire DrChrono for approximately $180 million | MarketScreener

summary.en: eSignature, digital workflow, and electronic fax software for small and mid-market businesses.
summary.zh: 為中小型企業打造的電子簽名、數位工作流程與電子傳真軟體。

highlight.en: Started as HelloFax and became a leading DocuSign challenger trusted by 80,000+ companies. Dropbox acquired HelloSign in early 2019 for $230M to add e-signature to its document workflows.
highlight.zh: 前身為 HelloFax,後成為挑戰 DocuSign 的主要對手,獲逾 8 萬家企業採用。Dropbox 於 2019 年初以 2.3 億美元收購 HelloSign,為其文件工作流程加入電子簽名功能。

funding.zh: 2019 年被 Dropbox 以 2.3 億美元收購

sources.title: Dropbox snares HelloSign for $230M | TechCrunch
Dropbox to Acquire HelloSign | Dropbox

summary.en: Pay-what-you-want storefront and subscription for games, ebooks, and software that supports charity.
summary.zh: 讓你自訂價格購買遊戲、電子書與軟體並支持公益的商店與訂閱平台。

highlight.en: A YC W11 distribution platform that pioneered pay-what-you-want bundles and has raised over $250M for charity. IGN Entertainment (Ziff Davis) acquired Humble Bundle in October 2017 for an undisclosed sum.
highlight.zh: YC W11 的數位內容平台,開創「自訂價格」組合包模式,已為公益募得超過 2.5 億美元。IGN Entertainment(Ziff Davis 旗下)於 2017 年 10 月以未公開金額收購 Humble Bundle。

funding.en: Acquired by IGN Entertainment / Ziff Davis (2017, terms undisclosed)
funding.zh: 2017 年被 IGN Entertainment / Ziff Davis 收購(金額未公開)

sources.title: Humble Bundle has been acquired by IGN | Android Police
Humble Bundle - Wikipedia

summary.en: Clinical intelligence SaaS that unifies and analyzes trial data to speed up and improve clinical trials.
summary.zh: 臨床智能 SaaS,整合並分析試驗資料,以加速並提升臨床試驗的速度與品質。

highlight.en: A YC W11 healthcare startup backed by Sequoia and Lightspeed that built centralized monitoring and data-review tools for clinical operations. Saama Technologies acquired Comprehend Systems in August 2019 to form a combined clinical analytics company.
highlight.zh: YC W11 醫療新創,獲 Sequoia 與 Lightspeed 投資,為臨床作業打造集中監測與資料審查工具。Saama Technologies 於 2019 年 8 月收購 Comprehend Systems,合併成立臨床分析公司。

funding.en: Acquired by Saama Technologies (2019, terms undisclosed); backed by Sequoia and Lightspeed
funding.zh: 2019 年被 Saama Technologies 收購(金額未公開);獲 Sequoia 與 Lightspeed 投資

sources.title: Saama Technologies Acquires Comprehend Systems
Saama and Comprehend to Form Preeminent Clinical Analytics Platform Company | Business Wire

summary.en: Maker of the customizable Pebble smartwatch that delivers phone notifications and runs third-party apps.
summary.zh: 可客製化 Pebble 智慧手錶的製造商,可顯示手機通知並執行第三方應用程式。

highlight.en: A YC W11 hardware icon whose 2012 Kickstarter became one of the platform's biggest-ever campaigns and helped define the smartwatch era. Fitbit acquired Pebble's software and IP in December 2016 (reported $35-40M) and wound down the hardware.
highlight.zh: YC W11 的硬體代表作,其 2012 年 Kickstarter 募資成為該平台史上最大規模之一,並定義了智慧手錶時代。Fitbit 於 2016 年 12 月收購 Pebble 的軟體與智財(據報 3,500 萬至 4,000 萬美元),硬體業務隨之結束。

funding.en: Software/IP acquired by Fitbit in 2016 (reported $35-40M); raised tens of millions via Kickstarter and VC
funding.zh: 2016 年軟體與智財被 Fitbit 收購(據報 3,500 萬至 4,000 萬美元);透過 Kickstarter 與創投募得數千萬美元

sources.title: Pebble confirms it's shutting down, devs and software going to Fitbit | TechCrunch
Pebble Shuts Down After Fitbit Buys Software | PYMNTS

summary.en: Cross-compiler that ported Objective-C iOS apps and games to Android without a separate Java codebase.
summary.zh: 跨平台編譯器,可將 Objective-C 編寫的 iOS 應用與遊戲移植到 Android,無需另寫 Java 程式碼。

highlight.en: A YC W11 developer-tools startup used by top mobile games like Kingdom Rush and Osmos and the SpriteBuilder toolset. Apportable was acqui-hired by Google in 2015 after raising around $7.5M from investors including Google Ventures.
highlight.zh: YC W11 的開發者工具新創,獲 Kingdom Rush、Osmos 等熱門手遊及 SpriteBuilder 工具套件採用。Apportable 在募得約 750 萬美元(投資者包括 Google Ventures)後,於 2015 年被 Google 以人才收購方式併入。

funding.en: Acqui-hired by Google (2015); raised ~$7.5M (Google Ventures, YC and others)
funding.zh: 2015 年被 Google 以人才收購;募得約 750 萬美元(Google Ventures、YC 等)

sources.title: Google Secretly Acqui-Hired Mobile App Development Startup Apportable
Apportable Lands $5M to Help Developers Convert iOS Games to Android | TechCrunch

summary.en: Developer-focused email API for sending, receiving, and tracking transactional and marketing email.
summary.zh: 以開發者為核心的電子郵件 API,用於發送、接收與追蹤交易型與行銷型郵件。

highlight.en: A YC W11 email-delivery platform used by Slack, Lyft, GitHub, and Reddit; acquired by Rackspace in 2012 then spun back out in 2017. Its parent Pathwire was acquired by Sinch in 2021 in a deal valued at roughly $1.9B.
highlight.zh: YC W11 的電子郵件投遞平台,獲 Slack、Lyft、GitHub、Reddit 採用;2012 年被 Rackspace 收購,2017 年再度獨立。其母公司 Pathwire 於 2021 年被 Sinch 以約 19 億美元的交易收購。

funding.en: Acquired by Rackspace (2012); parent Pathwire acquired by Sinch for ~$1.9B (2021)
funding.zh: 2012 年被 Rackspace 收購;母公司 Pathwire 於 2021 年被 Sinch 以約 19 億美元收購

sources.title: Mailgun - Wikipedia
Mailgun Is Being Acquired By Rackspace | Mailgun

summary.en: UK fintech building a global bank-to-bank payment network for recurring and one-off direct debit payments.
summary.zh: 英國金融科技公司,打造全球銀行對銀行支付網路,處理定期與單次直接扣款付款。

highlight.en: A YC S11 fintech serving 75,000+ businesses and processing over $30B a year across 30+ countries. It became a unicorn in 2022 at a $2.1B valuation, and in December 2025 Mollie agreed to acquire GoCardless for €1.05B.
highlight.zh: YC S11 金融科技公司,服務逾 75,000 家企業,每年於 30 多個國家處理超過 300 億美元的款項。2022 年以 21 億美元估值晉身獨角獸,2025 年 12 月 Mollie 同意以 10.5 億歐元收購 GoCardless。

funding.en: Last valued ~$2.1B (2022); raised ~$540M total; Mollie acquisition agreed at €1.05B (2025)
funding.zh: 最近估值約 21 億美元(2022 年);累計募資約 5.4 億美元;2025 年 Mollie 同意以 10.5 億歐元收購

founders: Hiroki Takeuchi, Matt Robinson, Tom Blomfield

sources.title: GoCardless - Wikipedia
GoCardless enters unicorn club with $312 million funding and $2.1 billion valuation | Tech.eu

summary.en: Customer data platform with a single API to collect, clean, and route first-party data to other tools.
summary.zh: 顧客資料平台,透過單一 API 收集、清理並將第一方資料導向各種工具。

highlight.en: A YC S11 breakout that defined the customer data platform (CDP) category and reached a $1.5B private valuation. Twilio acquired Segment in late 2020 for $3.2B in an all-stock deal.
highlight.zh: YC S11 的爆紅公司,定義了顧客資料平台(CDP)類別,私募估值達 15 億美元。Twilio 於 2020 年底以 32 億美元的全股票交易收購 Segment。

funding.en: Acquired by Twilio for $3.2B (2020); last private valuation ~$1.5B
funding.zh: 2020 年被 Twilio 以 32 億美元收購;最後一輪私募估值約 15 億美元

founders: Peter Reinhardt, Calvin French-Owen, Ilya Volodarsky, Ian Storm Taylor

sources.title: Twilio wraps $3.2B purchase of Segment | TechCrunch
Twilio Completes Acquisition of Segment | Twilio

summary.en: Mobile and web app platform giving developers real-time backend, database, and growth tooling.
summary.zh: 行動與網頁應用平台,提供開發者即時後端、資料庫與成長工具。

highlight.en: A YC S11 startup whose real-time backend became beloved by developers building iOS, Android, and web apps. Google acquired Firebase in October 2014, and it is now Google's flagship app development platform.
highlight.zh: YC S11 新創,其即時後端深受開發 iOS、Android 與網頁應用的工程師喜愛。Google 於 2014 年 10 月收購 Firebase,如今已成為 Google 的旗艦級應用開發平台。

funding.en: Acquired by Google (2014, terms undisclosed); raised ~$13M before the deal
funding.zh: 2014 年被 Google 收購(金額未公開);收購前募得約 1,300 萬美元

sources.title: Google Acquires Firebase To Help Developers Build Better Real-Time Apps | TechCrunch
Firebase - Wikipedia

summary.en: Leading online learning platform offering interactive courses for in-demand technical and coding skills.
summary.zh: 領先的線上學習平台,提供互動式課程,教授高需求的技術與程式設計技能。

highlight.en: A YC S11 edtech that introduced free interactive coding courses explored by tens of millions of learners worldwide. Skillsoft acquired Codecademy in 2021-2022 for approximately $525M in cash and stock.
highlight.zh: YC S11 的教育科技公司,推出免費互動式程式課程,全球數千萬名學習者使用。Skillsoft 於 2021 至 2022 年以約 5.25 億美元的現金加股票收購 Codecademy。

funding.zh: 被 Skillsoft 以約 5.25 億美元收購(2021 年宣布,2022 年完成)

sources.title: Skillsoft buys coding education platform Codecademy for $525M | SiliconANGLE
Skillsoft to Acquire Codecademy | Skillsoft
